name: Select
description: Native-feeling styled dropdown with search and groups.

api.name: Select
api.description: Native-feeling styled dropdown with search and groups.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Popover open state. Bind via @bind-Open when the Select lives inside a parent that re-renders heavily (e.g. an EditForm with active validation) — otherwise a parameter cascade can close the popover mid-click. In the bound (controlled) mode the parent owns state and the popover survives re-renders. When unbound, the component still functions but is vulnerable to the cascade-close race; binding is the recommended pattern.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: Optional data source. When set, SelectContent renders options from this list instead of ChildContent.

parameters.name: ItemValue
parameters.description: Extracts the string value for each item. Defaults to ToString().

parameters.name: ItemText
parameters.description: Extracts the display label for each item. Defaults to ItemValue when null.

parameters.name: ItemGroup
parameters.description: Optional group key extractor. When set, options are grouped under sticky headers.

parameters.name: ItemTemplate
parameters.description: Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object.

parameters.name: Virtualize
parameters.description: When true and Items is set, uses Blazor's Virtualize component for the option list.

parameters.name: ItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated pixel height of each option row used by the Virtualize component. Default 36.

records.name: SelectContext
records.signature:
SelectContext(
        string? Value, bool IsOpen, bool Searchable, string SearchText,
        bool Multiple, List<string>? Values, bool IsLoading, bool Disabled, bool Clearable, bool Creatable, int MaxDisplayTags,
        EventCallback<string> OnSelect, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, EventCallback<string> OnSearch,
        EventCallback OnClear, EventCallback<string> OnCreateItem,
        string WrapperId, string ContentId, int FocusedIndex, string? FocusedItemId, string? FocusedItemValue,
        EventCallback<int> SetFocusedIndex,
        Action<string, string> RegisterItem, Action<string> UnregisterItem,
        bool Invalid, bool Required,
        // Data-bound mode params (null when composition mode)
        IEnumerable<object>? Items,
        Func<object, string> ItemValue,
        Func<object, string>? ItemText,
        Func<object, string?>? ItemGroup,
        Func<object, bool>? ItemDisabled,
        RenderFragment<object>? ItemTemplate,
        bool Virtualize,
        float ItemSize)

examples.title: Default
examples.code: @code { private string? _selected; }

examples.title: With Binding
examples.code: Selected: @(_selected ?? "none")

examples.title: With Groups
Searchable

parameters.name: SearchValue
parameters.description: Optional text used to match against the search input when Searchable is enabled. Falls back to Value.

slots.name: ItemTemplate
slots.description: Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object.

mdSummary:
# Select

Native-feeling styled dropdown with search and groups.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/select

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Select | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Select | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Select | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| Select | Open | `bool` | `` | Popover open state. Bind via @bind-Open when the Select lives inside a parent that re-renders heavily (e.g. an EditForm with active validation) — otherwise a parameter cascade can close the popover mid-click. In the bound (controlled) mode the parent owns state and the popover survives re-renders. When unbound, the component still functions but is vulnerable to the cascade-close race; binding is the recommended pattern. |
| Select | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Select | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Select | Searchable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Multiple | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Values | `List<string>?` | `` |  |
| Select | ValuesChanged | `EventCallback<List<string>?>` | `` |  |
| Select | Clearable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Creatable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | OnCreate | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Select | MaxDisplayTags | `int` | `3` |  |
| Select | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | IsLoading | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Select | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Select | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| Select | Items | `IEnumerable<object>?` | `` | Optional data source. When set, SelectContent renders options from this list instead of ChildContent. |
| Select | ItemValue | `Func<object, string>` | `it => it?.ToString() ?? ""` | Extracts the string value for each item. Defaults to ToString(). |
| Select | ItemText | `Func<object, string>?` | `` | Extracts the display label for each item. Defaults to ItemValue when null. |
| Select | ItemGroup | `Func<object, string?>?` | `` | Optional group key extractor. When set, options are grouped under sticky headers. |
| Select | ItemDisabled | `Func<object, bool>?` | `` | Optional per-item disabled predicate. |
| Select | ItemTemplate | `RenderFragment<object>?` | `` | Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object. |
| Select | Virtualize | `bool` | `` | When true and Items is set, uses Blazor's Virtualize component for the option list. |
| Select | ItemSize | `float` | `36f` | Estimated pixel height of each option row used by the Virtualize component. Default 36. |
| SelectContent | Context | `Select.SelectContext` | `default!` |  |
| SelectContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SelectContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SelectContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SelectGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SelectGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SelectGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SelectItem | Context | `Select.SelectContext` | `default!` |  |
| SelectItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SelectItem | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| SelectItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| SelectItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SelectItem | SearchValue | `string?` | `` | Optional text used to match against the search input when Searchable is enabled. Falls back to Value. |
| SelectItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SelectLabel | GroupContext | `SelectGroup.SelectGroupContext?` | `` |  |
| SelectLabel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SelectLabel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SelectLabel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SelectTrigger | Context | `Select.SelectContext` | `default!` |  |
| SelectTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SelectTrigger | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| SelectTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SelectTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Select) — RenderFragment slot
- `ItemTemplate` (Select) — Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object.
- `ChildContent` (SelectContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SelectGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SelectItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SelectLabel) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (SelectTrigger) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `ValuesChanged` (`EventCallback<List<string>?>`)
- `OnCreate` (`EventCallback<string>`)

## Sub-components
- `SelectContent`, `SelectGroup`, `SelectItem`, `SelectLabel`, `SelectTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)
- `Context` (`Select.SelectContext`)
- `GroupContext` (`SelectGroup.SelectGroupContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Select />
```
